title: Tunisian Smoky Seed Stir Fry
description: A flavorful and spicy stir fry made with smoky seeds and tunisian spices.

ingredients.name: Tunisian spice blend
ingredients.notes: Available at most middle eastern stores

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of olive oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chopped onion and minced garlic and sauté until softened.
Add the chopped bell pepper and cook until tender.
Add the mixed seeds and cook for 2-3 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the tunisian spice blend and stir to combine.
Stir in the poppy seeds and cook for another minute.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot over rice or with naan bread.
